rationale.R1.1: Positioning inherently requires evaluating how well the artifact articulates the gap (what prior systems cannot do) and the contribution claim (what AgentFlow uniquely offers); the closing paragraph's novelty assertion makes this central.
rationale.R1.2: Each contrast drawn relies on a chain of premises (e.g., 'agent workloads differ structurally from batch requests'; 'step graphs are emitted at runtime, not declared statically'); logical soundness of those chains is a primary quality criterion for positioning text.
rationale.R1.4: This is the load-bearing dimension: 'position against prior work' is synonymous with assessing the delta between AgentFlow and the three cited lines; if the novelty characterization is wrong or understated, the delegation fails entirely.
rationale.R1.7: The artifact names three prior-work categories but cites zero specific papers, systems, or authors; evaluating positioning quality requires assessing whether the stated landscape is accurate, complete, and fairly attributed.
